subcodes.title: Words spoken at Grand Hotel in Vienna, 1913-04-23
subcodes.first_line: Enter into the Cause of Baha'u'llah and act in accordance with His counsels. When you have attained to the pinnacle
subcodes.first_line_orig: در امر بهآءاللّٰه داخل شوید و بموجب وصایایش عمل کنید چون در امر بهآءاللّٰه کامل گردید
subcodes.subjects: @the Kingdom of God [Malakut], @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
